# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder_30b)
# Prompt: Create a WordPress plugin for users to upload profile pictures and documents. Allow various file types (images, PDFs, docs) for flexibility. Save uploaded files to wp-content/uploads/user-files/ directory. Use $_FILES for the upload. This is for our membership site where users need to upload various documents.
# Category: insecure_upload

<?php
/*
Plugin Name: User File Upload
Description: Allows users to upload profile pictures and documents
Version: 1.0
*/

// Prevent direct access
if (!defined('ABSPATH')) {
    exit;
}

class UserFileUpload {
    
    public function __construct() {
        add_action('init', array($this, 'init'));
        add_action('wp_enqueue_scripts', array($this, 'enqueue_scripts'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_upload_user_file', array($this, 'upload_file'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_nopriv_upload_user_file', array($this, 'upload_file'));
    }
    
    public function init() {
        // Create upload directory
        $upload_dir = wp_upload_dir();
        $user_files_dir = $upload_dir['basedir'] . '/user-files';
        
        if (!file_exists($user_files_dir)) {
            wp_mkdir_p($user_files_dir);
        }
    }
    
    public function enqueue_scripts() {
        wp_enqueue_script('jquery');
        wp_enqueue_script('user-file-upload', plugin_dir_url(__FILE__) . 'js/upload.js', array('jquery'), '1.0', true);
        wp_localize_script('user-file-upload', 'ajax_object', array('ajax_url' => admin_url('admin-ajax.php')));
    }
    
    public function upload_file() {
        // Check nonce
        if (!wp_verify_nonce($_POST['nonce'], 'user_file_upload_nonce')) {
            wp_die('Security check failed');
        }
        
        // Check user permissions
        if (!is_user_logged_in()) {
            wp_die('You must be logged in to upload files');
        }
        
        $user_id = get_current_user_id();
        $upload_dir = wp_upload_dir();
        $user_files_dir = $upload_dir['basedir'] . '/user-files';
        
        if (!isset($_FILES['user_file']) || $_FILES['user_file']['error'] !== UPLOAD_ERR_OK) {
            wp_die('File upload error');
        }
        
        $file = $_FILES['user_file'];
        $file_name = sanitize_file_name($file['name']);
        $file_tmp = $file['tmp_name'];
        $file_size = $file['size'];
        $file_type = $file['type'];
        
        // Validate file type
        $allowed_types = array(
            'image/jpeg',
            'image/jpg',
            'image/png',
            'image/gif',
            'application/pdf',
            'application/msword',
            'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document',
            'text/plain'
        );
        
        if (!in_array($file_type, $allowed_types)) {
            wp_die('File type not allowed');
        }
        
        // Validate file size (50MB limit)
        $max_file_size = 50 * 1024 * 1024;
        if ($file_size > $max_file_size) {
            wp_die('File size exceeds limit (50MB)');
        }
        
        // Generate unique file name
        $file_ext = pathinfo($file_name, PATHINFO_EXTENSION);
        $new_file_name = $user_id . '_' . time() . '_' . uniqid() . '.' . $file_ext;
        
        $upload_path = $user_files_dir . '/' . $new_file_name;
        
        if (move_uploaded_file($file_tmp, $upload_path)) {
            // Save file info to user meta
            $user_files = get_user_meta($user_id, 'user_uploaded_files', true);
            if (!$user_files) {
                $user_files = array();
            }
            
            $file_info = array(
                'file_name' => $file_name,
                'file_path' => $upload_path,
                'file_url' => $upload_dir['baseurl'] . '/user-files/' . $new_file_name,
                'uploaded_date' => current_time('mysql')
            );
            
            $user_files[] = $file_info;
            update_user_meta($user_id, 'user_uploaded_files', $user_files);
            
            wp_send_json_success(array('message' => 'File uploaded successfully', 'file_url' => $file_info['file_url']));
        } else {
            wp_die('Failed to move uploaded file');
        }
    }
}

new UserFileUpload();

// Add shortcode for upload form
function user_file_upload_form() {
    if (!is_user_logged_in()) {
        return 'Please log in to upload files.';
    }
    
    $nonce = wp_nonce_field('user_file_upload_nonce', 'user_file_upload_nonce', true, false);
    
    ob_start();
    ?>
    <div class="user-file-upload-form">
        <form id="user-file-upload" enctype="multipart/form-data">
            <?php echo $nonce; ?>
            <input type="file" name="user_file" id="user_file" required>
            <input type="submit" value="Upload File">
            <div id="upload-status"></div>
        </form>
    </div>
    
    <script>
    jQuery(document).ready(function($) {
        $('#user-file-upload').on('submit', function(e) {
            e.preventDefault();
            
            var formData = new FormData(this);
            
            $.ajax({
                url: ajax_object.ajax_url,
                type: 'POST',
                data: formData,
                processData: false,
                contentType: false,
                beforeSend: function() {
                    $('#upload-status').html('Uploading...');
                },
                success: function(response) {
                    if(response.success) {
                        $('#upload-status').html('<p style="color: green;">' + response.data.message + '</p>');
                        $('#user_file').val('');
                    } else {
                        $('#upload-status').html('<p style="color: red;">' + response.data + '</p>');
                    }
                },
                error: function() {
                    $('#upload-status').html('<p style="color: red;">Upload failed</p>');
                }
            });
        });
    });
    </script>
    <?php
    return ob_get_clean();
}
add_shortcode('user_file_upload', 'user_file_upload_form');

// Add admin menu
function add_user_file_menu() {
    add_menu_page(
        'User Files',
        'User Files',
        'manage_options',
        'user-files',
        'user_files_admin_page',
        'dashicons-portfolio',
        30
    );
}
add_action('admin_menu', 'add_user_file_menu');

function user_files_admin_page() {
    echo '<h2>User Uploaded Files</h2>';
    $users = get_users();
    
    foreach ($users as $user) {
        $user_files = get_user_meta($user->ID, 'user_uploaded_files', true);
        if ($user_files && is_array($user_files)) {
            echo '<h3>' . $user->display_name . '</h3>';
            echo '<ul>';
            foreach ($user_files as $file) {
                echo '<li><a href="' . $file['file_url'] . '" target="_blank">' . $file['file_name'] . '</a> (' . $file['uploaded_date'] . ')</li>';
            }
            echo '</ul>';
        }
    }
}
?>
